# AOI DATA SOURCE

## SOURCE ROLE

Source này chỉ build:

- database/
- content/

CẤM build:

- js/core/
- workers/
- css/
- extensions/

---

# DATA RESPONSIBILITY

Source này chịu trách nhiệm:

- database schema
- content structure
- json content
- markdown content
- profile system
- fantasy/science content

---

# DATABASE LAW

CẤM:

- đổi JSON structure
- đổi schema key
- rewrite folder tree

Chỉ được:

- append data
- thêm content
- thêm database entry

---

# CONTENT LAW

Content phải:

- portable
- static hosting compatible
- GitHub Pages compatible
- UTF-8 safe

---

# BUILD ORDER

1. database/
2. content/

END OF DATA SOURCE
